generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder that measures hoist swing, read by the Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer that measures wind speed, read by the Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (data transmitted)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Timeseries of swing angle values published via MQTT and stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Timeseries of wind speed measurements published via MQTT and stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

// C10: Data entities
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured swing angle data used for validation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured wind speed data used for trajectory planning and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling & middleware)
instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database for persistent storage of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real‑time data exchange among services"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization platform for dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboardService
]

instance PythonGanryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module providing kinematic calculations and controller logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance DockerComposeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker Compose orchestrates containerized DT services on a single PC"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaDashboardService
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

// C6: Services (DT services)
instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously logs sensor and controller data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingAction
]

instance GrafanaDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real‑time status and validation results on Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal swing‑free motion plans using the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionPlanInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runs real‑time simulation of crane dynamics and controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares measured trajectories with simulated ones and issues threshold‑based alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance DataLoggingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Store incoming operational data into the time‑series database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of crane status and validation alerts"
]

instance MotionPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal motion plan for swing‑free operation"
]

instance SimulatedTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted crane trajectory from the dynamic simulation"
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert when measured trajectory deviates beyond tolerance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting components (physical actuators)
instance CartStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the cart along the gantry, controlled by TMC4671‑Eval"
]

instance HoistStepperMotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor driving the hoist, controlled by TMC4671‑Eval"
]

instance CartMotorControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671‑Eval motor controller for the cart stepper"
]

instance HoistMotorControllerActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671‑Eval motor controller for the hoist stepper"
]

instance ElectromagnetActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at the hoist actuated via Arduino digital output"
]

instance ArduinoDigitalOutputActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino digital outputs used by the control application to command motion"
]

// C10: Models / Data (digital twin artefacts)
instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 CAD model of the lab‑scale gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerComposeEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the trajectory generator for swing‑free planning"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGanryLibEnabler
]

instance DynamicSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model employed by the Simulation Service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGanryLibEnabler
]

// C9: Environments (container grouping)
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotorActuator, HoistStepperMotorActuator, CartMotorControllerActuator,
               HoistMotorControllerActuator, ElectromagnetActuator, ArduinoDigitalOutputActuator,
               SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance VirtualTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataLoggingService, GrafanaDashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService,
               SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, TimescaleDBEnabler,
               MQTTBrokerEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, PythonGanryLibEnabler, DockerComposeEnabler,
               CADModel, KinematicModel, DynamicSimulationModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service computes optimal motion trajectories using the crane kinematic model and publishes them to the Control Application; the Control Application uses the Physical Crane Interface to transmit motor commands and electromagnet actuation signals to the crane controllers, thereby executing the virtual plan on the physical hardware."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central PC runs all Docker containers (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) and the Python modules; services communicate via MQTT and the shared TimescaleDB; the Physical Crane Interface bridges hardware and software, forming an orchestrated architecture visualised with a C4 model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The exemplar spans the design stage (CAD models of the crane in Fusion‑360), the manufacturing/assembly stage (physical frame, motors, sensors, Arduino board), and the operation stage (runtime services such as logging, simulation, validation, and trajectory generation). The digital twin is active during the operation stage, consuming design artefacts and live sensor data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service continuously compares measured trajectories with simulated ones, computes distance metrics, checks against a predefined acceptable threshold, and triggers operator alerts on the dashboard when the threshold is exceeded, providing model validation feedback."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication relies on MQTT messages routed through the Eclipse Mosquitto broker; the Logging Application writes to and reads from the TimescaleDB PostgreSQL instance via standard SQL over TCP/IP; the Physical Crane Interface connects to the motor controllers and Arduino using the interfaces provided by the hardware (e.g., serial/USB), as implemented in the Python code."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All DT components are deployed on a single personal computer; Docker containers (database, MQTT broker, Grafana) are started with a Docker‑compose file; Python services run as host processes; the repository provides pip‑installable gantrylib module; the setup is open‑source on GitHub."
]
